INSERT INTO risk_db.daily_summary SELECT account_id, SUM(amount) FROM risk_db.transactions GROUP BY account_id
SELECT t1.*, t2.risk_score FROM risk_db.trades t1 JOIN risk_db.risk_metrics t2 ON t1.trade_id = t2.trade_id
INSERT INTO reporting_db.daily_summary SELECT account_id, SUM(amount) FROM reporting_db.transactions GROUP BY account_id
CREATE TABLE trading_db.temp_results AS SELECT * FROM trading_db.source_table WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT * FROM reporting_db.transactions WHERE trade_date > '2024-01-01' AND amount > 1000000
CREATE TABLE reporting_db.temp_results AS SELECT * FROM reporting_db.source_table WHERE status = 'active'
CREATE TABLE risk_db.temp_results AS SELECT * FROM risk_db.source_table WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT t1.*, t2.risk_score FROM trading_db.trades t1 JOIN trading_db.risk_metrics t2 ON t1.trade_id = t2.trade_id
SELECT t1.*, t2.risk_score FROM reporting_db.trades t1 JOIN reporting_db.risk_metrics t2 ON t1.trade_id = t2.trade_id
SELECT t1.*, t2.risk_score FROM customer_db.trades t1 JOIN customer_db.risk_metrics t2 ON t1.trade_id = t2.trade_id
SELECT * FROM trading_db.transactions WHERE trade_date > '2024-01-01' AND amount > 1000000
INSERT INTO customer_db.daily_summary SELECT account_id, SUM(amount) FROM customer_db.transactions GROUP BY account_id
SELECT * FROM customer_db.transactions WHERE trade_date > '2024-01-01' AND amount > 1000000
